prompt: Add a 'search by serial number' input and label to the top of the bikes index page. It should be a simple form that submits to the existing search action. Show me the modified view and any new partial/component you'd add.

assertions.text: Form input element uses the `twinput` class
assertions.check: regex: class="[^"]*\btwinput\b[^"]*" appears on at least one <input ...> tag in any .html.erb file
regex: class="[^"]*\btwlabel\b[^"]*" appears on at least one <label ...> tag in any .html.erb file

assertions.text: Tailwind utility classes use the `tw:` prefix (no bare `flex`/`px-N`/`bg-`/`rounded`/etc.)
assertions.check: no class token in any class="..." attribute matches a Tailwind utility pattern without the `tw:` prefix
